hero.title: Enterprise Software Development
hero.description: Mapulogalamu ogwira ntchito kumapeto ndi mapeto omwe ali ndi mawonekedwe amakono, zomangamanga za API-zoyamba, ndi scalability yamtambo.

problem.title: Kupanga Vuto la Bizinesi
problem.subtitle: Kumene mapulogalamu ogwira ntchito amataya liwiro, bajeti, ndi kugwirizana kwa njira

approach.title: Njira ya Uinjiniya
approach.subtitle: Momwe timasinthira zofunikira zosamvetsetseka kukhala nsanja zokonzekera kupanga

principles.title: Mfundo za Zomangamanga
principles.subtitle: Kupanga zosankha zomwe zimapangitsa kuti machitidwe ogwira ntchito azisungidwe pamlingo

breakdown.title: Kuwonongeka kwa Utumiki
breakdown.subtitle: Njira yokonzedweratu kuchokera pakupezeka mpaka kupanga kokhazikika

problem.overview: Magulu ogwira ntchito nthawi zambiri amanyamula ntchito zovuta pamachitidwe osakanikirana, ndikupanga nthawi yayitali yotsogolera, deta yosagwirizana, komanso mgwirizano wokwera mtengo pakati pa madipatimenti.
painPoints: Kudzipereka kwa kutumiza kumatsetsereka chifukwa kudalira m'magulu onse sikuyang'aniridwa
Mfundo zazikulu zamalonda zimabwerezedwa m'njira ndi mankhwala
Kuphatikizidwa kwa cholowa kumapangitsa kuti zinthu zatsopano zikhale zoopsa kwambiri komanso pang'onopang'ono
impactSignals: Njira yodutsa ya roadmap imatsika pomwe ndalama zomangamanga zikuwonjezeka
Zolakwika zoyang'anizana ndi makasitomala zimakwera panthawi yotulutsa
Kupanga zisankho kumachepa chifukwa cha malipoti osagwirizana ogwira ntchito

approach.overview: Ife kupha ndi zomangamanga-choyamba kupeza, mgwirizano zoyendetsedwa yobereka, ndi ankalamulira kumasulidwa zomangamanga kotero phindu malonda ndi kutumizidwa mu increments kudziwika.

pillars.title: Domain Modeling & Bounded Contexts
pillars.detail: Timapanga mapu a madera kuti tichotse malire a utumiki kuti tichepetse kulumikizana kwa magulu a mtanda ndikumveketsa umwini.

pillars.title: API-First Integration Strategy
pillars.detail: Timatanthauzira mapangano okhazikika oyambirira, zomwe zimapangitsa chitukuko chofanana ndi kugwirizana kotetezeka ndi machitidwe ogwira ntchito.

pillars.title: Ntchito Yoperekera Pang'onopang'ono
pillars.detail: Timagwiritsa ntchito mbendera zachinthu, ma rollouts opangidwa, ndi zipata zabwino kuti timasule mwachangu popanda kusokoneza kupanga.

principles.overview: Zosankha zathu zomangamanga zimaika patsogolo moyo wautali, operability, ndi umwini womveka bwino kotero nsanja zimakhalabe zosinthika pamene kukula kwa bizinesi kukukula.

items.title: Malire a Modular Service
items.detail: Mphamvu zimaphatikizidwa mozungulira madera a bizinesi kuti kusintha kukhale komweko.

items.title: Kuphatikizidwa Kosakankhidwa ndi Zochitika
items.detail: Ntchito za Asynchronous zimagwiritsidwa ntchito pomwe kulekerera kwa latency kulipo kuti apititse patsogolo kukhazikika ndi kusokoneza machitidwe.

items.title: Kuwonedwa ndi Kapangidwe
items.detail: Kufufuza, metrics, ndi mitengo yokonzedwa imafotokozedwa patsogolo kuti zithandizire ntchito zodalirika ndi kayendetsedwe ka SLA.

breakdown.title: Kupeza ndi Zomangamanga
breakdown.summary: Timapanga mapu ofunikira a bizinesi, zopinga zaukadaulo, ndi zomangamanga zolinga zisanayambe.

breakdown.title: Kumanga ndi Kuphatikiza
breakdown.summary: Magulu athu amagwiritsa ntchito zinthu zazikulu, zigawo zophatikiza, ndi chitetezo chabwino mofanana.
deliverables: Chitukuko cha mbali mu iterative sprints
API ndi kuphatikiza kwa gulu lachitatu
Kuyezetsa makina ndi kumasulidwa kukonzekera macheke

breakdown.title: Kuyambitsa & Kusinthika
breakdown.summary: Pambuyo popita-moyo, timakhazikitsa ntchito ndikufotokozera njira yotsatira yowongolera potengera kugwiritsa ntchito kwenikweni.
deliverables: Kusintha kwa magwiridwe antchito ndi kudalirika
Pambuyo pa kukhazikitsa mapu ndi kupititsa patsogolo kumbuyo

cta.title: Takonzeka Kumanga Ntchito Yanu Yotsatira?
cta.description: Tiyeni tipange ndi kutumiza yankho lomwe limayendetsa zotsatira zamalonda zoyezeka.

hero.title: AI, ML ndi Business Intelligence
hero.description: Kuchokera ku zitsanzo zolosera kupita ku dashboards akuluakulu, timamanga machitidwe athunthu a AI / BI omwe amathandizira zosankha pamlingo.

problem.title: Kupanga Vuto la Bizinesi
problem.subtitle: Chifukwa chiyani mabungwe olemera a deta amavutikabe kupanga zosankha zodalirika

approach.title: Njira ya Uinjiniya
approach.subtitle: Momwe timagwiritsira ntchito mankhwala a deta, zitsanzo za ML, ndi ntchito za BI

principles.title: Mfundo za Zomangamanga
principles.subtitle: Deta ndi chitsanzo cha zomangamanga za nzeru zodalirika za chisankho

capabilities.title: Mphamvu Zathu
capabilities.subtitle: Njira zambiri za AI, ML, ndi BI

technology.title: Nkhokwe Yathu Yaukadaulo
technology.subtitle: Zida zotsogola zamakampani a deta ndi AI

breakdown.title: Kuwonongeka kwa Utumiki
breakdown.subtitle: Momwe timasunthira kuchokera ku deta yogawanika kupita ku nzeru zopangira

problem.overview: Mabungwe nthawi zambiri amasonkhanitsa deta yambiri koma amalephera kumasulira kukhala kulosera kodalirika, zosankha zogwirira ntchito, kapena zochita zamalonda zoyezeka.
painPoints: Mfundo zofotokozera zimasiyana m'magulu onse, zomwe zimapangitsa kuti pakhale nkhani zotsutsana za KPI
Zitsanzo zimakhalabe zoyeserera ndipo sizifika pantchito yopanga
Nkhani za khalidwe la deta zimawononga chikhulupiriro mu analytics ndi ma dashboard akuluakulu
impactSignals: Zosankha zimayenda pang'onopang'ono chifukwa magulu amatsutsana ndi kutsimikizika kwa deta m'malo mochitapo kanthu
Kulosera ndi kukonzekera molondola kumakhalabe kosagwirizana kotala pa kotala
Ndalama za analytics zikuwonetsa kutengera kotsika kunja kwa magulu apadera a akatswiri

approach.overview: Timapereka nsanja za AI ndi BI monga njira zopangira, kugwirizanitsa zomangamanga za deta, chitsanzo cha ntchito za moyo, ndi kusakanikirana kwa ntchito yosankha.

pillars.title: Data Product Foundation
pillars.detail: Zogulitsa deta zogwirizana ndi dera zimakhazikitsa zogwiritsanso ntchito, zolamulidwa, komanso zapamwamba kwambiri za analytics ndi ML.

pillars.title: MLOps Lifecycle Automation
pillars.detail: Kuphunzitsa, kutumiza, kuyang'anira, ndi kuyendetsa kuyendetsa kumapangidwira kuti zitsanzo zikhale zodalirika pakupanga.

pillars.title: Kusakanikirana kwa Ntchito Yosankha
pillars.detail: Chidziwitso chimaphatikizidwa mu zida zogwirira ntchito ndi ma dashboard kotero magulu amachita pa nzeru mkati mwa njira za tsiku ndi tsiku.

principles.overview: Zomangamanga zathu za AI / BI zimayika patsogolo deta yodalirika, zitsanzo zofotokozedwa, ndi njira zoyendetsera mwayi kudutsa bizinesi.

items.title: Mafotokozedwe a Single Metric
items.detail: Ma KPI ovuta amafotokozedwa kamodzi kudzera mu zitsanzo zogawana za semantic kuti athetse mfundo zotsutsana za malipoti.

items.title: Model Kudalirika Zowongolera
items.detail: Magwiridwe antchito, kudziwika kwa kuyendayenda, ndi njira zobwezeretsa zimateteza khalidwe la chisankho pakupanga.

items.title: Chitetezo ndi Ulamuliro ndi Kapangidwe
items.detail: Mzere wa deta, kupezeka kwa udindo, ndi maulamuliro okonzeka kuwunika amaphatikizidwa mu payipi iliyonse.

breakdown.title: Data Foundation
breakdown.summary: Timayang'anitsitsa magwero, kutanthauzira mapangano a deta, ndikukhazikitsa kayendetsedwe ka kayendetsedwe
deliverables: Gwero la deta ndi kuwunika kwabwino
Chitetezo ndi kayendetsedwe ka kayendetsedwe ka kaye

breakdown.title: Chitsanzo & Insight Delivery
breakdown.summary: Timamanga zitsanzo ndi ma dashboard osankha omwe amamangidwa ndi mafunso a bizinesi yoyeza ndi KPIs.
deliverables: Ma dashboard otsogolera ndi malipoti ogwira ntchito

breakdown.title: MLOps & Kulera
breakdown.summary: Timagwiritsa ntchito kutumiza, kuyang'anira, ndi kuthandizira gulu kuti zotsatira zikhale zodalirika pakapita nthawi.
deliverables: Kuthamanga, kulondola, ndi kuyang'anira kugwiritsa ntchito
Kupereka kwa gulu ndi ntchito yosewerera

cta.title: Sinthani Deta Yanu Kukhala Kuzindikira
cta.description: Sinthani deta yogawanika kukhala nzeru zomveka bwino, zochitapo kanthu.

hero.title: Zomangamanga za Mtambo ndi Zomangamanga
hero.description: Mapulatifomu a mitambo yambiri, zomangamanga zolimba, ndi zomangamanga zowonongeka zomwe zimapangidwira kukula kwa nthawi yayitali.

problem.title: Kupanga Vuto la Bizinesi
problem.subtitle: Chifukwa chiyani ntchito zamtambo zimaima pambuyo pa mafunde oyamba osamuka

approach.title: Njira ya Uinjiniya
approach.subtitle: Momwe timamangira nsanja zamtambo zotetezeka, zowonongeka ndi chiopsezo cholamulidwa cha kusamuka

principles.title: Mfundo za Zomangamanga
principles.subtitle: Zosankha za nsanja zomwe zimagwirizanitsa agility, kupirira, ndi kayendetsedwe ka zinthu

breakdown.title: Kuwonongeka kwa Utumiki
breakdown.subtitle: Ndondomeko yomveka bwino yopanga, kusamukira, ndi kugwiritsa ntchito nsanja zamtambo

problem.overview: Mabungwe ambiri amamaliza kusamuka koyambirira kwa mtambo koma amagwirabe ntchito ngati magulu omwe ali pamalopo, osawoneka bwino, maulamuliro osagwirizana, komanso kuwonjezeka kwa ndalama.
painPoints: Ntchito zimasamutsidwa popanda chitetezo chokhazikika ndi maulamuliro a intaneti
Mtengo wamtambo umakula mofulumira kuposa phindu la bizinesi loperekedwa
Kupereka chilengedwe kumakhalabe pamanja komanso kosagwirizana m'magulu onse
impactSignals: Zochitika pafupipafupi zomwe zimachitika chifukwa cha kasinthidwe pakati pa malo
Kukonzekera kwa audit kumawonongeka chifukwa cha machitidwe osakanikirana a kayendetsedwe ka kayendetsedwe ka kayendetsedwe ka
Nthawi zotsogola zomangamanga zimachedwetsa njira zopangira mankhwala ndi deta

approach.overview: Timapanga nsanja zamtambo ngati mankhwala, pogwiritsa ntchito makina opangira zomangamanga, njira zotetezera ndondomeko, ndi mafunde osamuka ogwirizana ndi kutsutsa kwa bizinesi.

pillars.title: Landing Zone monga Code
pillars.detail: Chizindikiritso, maukonde, chitetezo, ndi maziko a ndondomeko zimalembedwa kuti zibwezeretsedwe ndi kuwunika.

pillars.title: Njira Yosamukira ku Wave-Based
pillars.detail: Ntchito zimayenda m'magawo olamulidwa ndi kudalira komanso kukonzekera kubwezeretsa.

pillars.title: SRE + FinOps Operating Loop
pillars.detail: Zizindikiro zodalirika ndi unit-economics zimayang'aniridwa pamodzi kuti ziwongolere nthawi yonse yowonjezera komanso kugwiritsa ntchito bwino.

principles.overview: Chitsanzo chathu cha zomangamanga chimakonda zomangamanga zolengeza, mwayi wochepa, ndi nsanja zopangidwira zomwe zimathandizira kutumiza mankhwala mwachangu.

items.title: Njira Zosasinthika Zomangamanga
items.detail: Malo amamangidwanso kuchokera ku code versioned kuti achepetse kuthamanga ndikuphweka kuchira kwa ntchito.

items.title: Chitetezo cha Chitetezo ndi Kusakhulupirika
items.detail: Zero-trust access controls ndi kukhazikitsa ndondomeko zimaphatikizidwa mu moyo uliwonse wa chilengedwe.

items.title: Kukhazikika Kudzera Kugawa
items.detail: Ntchito zovuta zimapangidwira kulekerera kwa zigawo zambiri kapena zigawo zambiri zomwe zimakhudza bizinesi zimafuna.

breakdown.title: Zomangamanga & Landing Zone
breakdown.summary: Timatanthauzira boma la chandamale, ma guardrails, ndi miyezo ya nsanja yoyambira ntchito isanayambe kusuntha.

breakdown.title: Kusamuka ndi Kumanga Nsanja
breakdown.summary: Timapha mafunde osamuka ndikuyimira zigawo za nsanja zamtambo ndi makina obwerezabwereza.
deliverables: Zomangamanga monga ma module a Code

breakdown.title: Kudalirika & FinOps
breakdown.summary: Timawongolera kudalirika kwa ntchito ndikuwongolera mosalekeza ndalama zamtambo potengera telemetry yamoyo.
deliverables: SLOs, kuwunika, ndi zochitika zogwirira ntchito
Kukhazikika ndi kutsimikiziridwa kwa kuchira kwa masoka
Kuwongolera mtengo kumbuyo ndi kayendetsedwe ka

cta.title: Kukulitsa Zomangamanga Zanu
cta.description: Pangani maziko a mtambo omwe amakhala olimba pansi pa katundu weniweni.

hero.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
hero.description: Mapaipi operekera makina, kuwonera, ndi machitidwe a nsanja omwe amawongolera liwiro popanda kupereka nsembe kudalirika.

problem.title: Kupanga Vuto la Bizinesi
problem.subtitle: Chifukwa chiyani liwiro loperekera limatsika pamene zovuta za nsanja zikuwonjezeka

approach.title: Njira ya Uinjiniya
approach.subtitle: Momwe timakhazikitsira mapaipi operekera popanda kuchedwetsa magulu a mankhwala

principles.title: Mfundo za Zomangamanga
principles.subtitle: Njira zomangamanga za nsanja zomwe zimakulitsa kudalirika ndi kudziyimira pawokha kwa gulu

capabilities.title: Ntchito za DevOps
capabilities.subtitle: Makina, yang'anirani, ndikuwongolera moyo wanu woperekera

breakdown.title: Kuwonongeka kwa Utumiki
breakdown.subtitle: Njira yothandiza kuchokera ku mavuto operekera kupita ku kumasulidwa kwapamwamba kwambiri

problem.overview: Mabungwe nthawi zambiri amaika ndalama mu CI / CD tooling koma amalimbanabe ndi kutulutsidwa kosakhazikika, kuvomerezedwa pang'onopang'ono, ndi umwini wogawanika m'malo onse.
painPoints: Mafotokozedwe a mapaipi amasiyana ndi gulu, ndikupanga zipata zosagwirizana za khalidwe
Zovomerezeka zogwiritsira ntchito pamanja zimachedwetsa hotfix ndi nthawi yotulutsa mbali
Zochitika zogwirira ntchito zimabwerezanso chifukwa telemetry ndi yosakwanira kapena siloed
impactSignals: Nthawi yotsogolera kusintha ikupitilizabe kuwonjezeka ngakhale ndalama zogwiritsira ntchito makina
Sinthani kuchuluka kwa kulephera pa nthawi yoperekera voliyumu yapamwamba
Zokolola za opanga zimachepa chifukwa cha kukangana kwa zida ndi kusintha kwa nkhani

approach.overview: Timakhazikitsa chitsanzo cha nsanja yopanga mkati ndi ma tempuleti a mapaipi omwe angagwiritsidwenso ntchito, kayendetsedwe ka ndondomeko, ndi kuyang'ana kwathunthu kwa moyo.

pillars.title: Golden Path Pipeline Templates
pillars.detail: Mapulani a CI / CD omwe angagwiritsidwenso ntchito amagwirizanitsa kumanga, kuyesa, kuyang'anira chitetezo, ndi ntchito zotumizira.

pillars.title: Platform API & Self-Service
pillars.detail: Magulu amapereka malo ndikumasula zomangamanga kudzera mu mawonekedwe odziyimira pawokha.

pillars.title: Kudalirika Feedback Loops
pillars.detail: Zochitika zochitika, thanzi la SLO, ndi kutumiza telemetry zimadziwitsa kusintha kosalekeza kwa ndondomeko ndi zomangamanga.

principles.overview: Zomangamanga zathu za DevOps zimagwirizanitsa liwiro loperekera ndi kayendetsedwe ka ka

items.title: Chilichonse monga Versioned Code
items.detail: Mapaipi, zomangamanga, ndi malamulo a ndondomeko amayang'aniridwa mu ulamuliro wa gwero kuti awunikire ndi kubwereza.

items.title: Kutsimikiziridwa Kwapang'onopang'ono
items.detail: Khalidwe, chitetezo, ndi magwiridwe antchito amayikidwa m'magawo onse kuti adziwe chiopsezo kale.

items.title: Udindo Wogawana Nsanja
items.detail: Magulu a nsanja amapereka mphamvu zopangidwira pamsewu pomwe magulu a mankhwala amasunga umwini woperekera.

principles.title: Mfundo za Zomangamanga
principles.subtitle: Chitsanzo chogwirira ntchito ndi zosankha za nsanja zomwe zimateteza zotsatira za kusintha

technology.subtitle: Mapulatifomu ndi mapulatifomu omwe timagwiritsa ntchito kuti tigwiritse ntchito kusintha

breakdown.title: Kuwonongeka kwa Utumiki
breakdown.subtitle: Kusintha kwadongosolo kuchokera ku tanthauzo la njira kupita ku phindu la bizinesi loyezeka

problem.overview: Ntchito za digito nthawi zambiri zimayamba ndi cholinga champhamvu koma zimalephera kutembenuka kukhala zotsatira zoperekera chifukwa cha umwini wosadziwika bwino, zida zosagwirizana, ndi zofunikira zopikisana.
painPoints: Njira zosinthira zimafotokozedwa koma osamasuliridwa kukhala kayendetsedwe ka kayendetse
Zofunikira zamalonda ndi zomangamanga zimasiyana pambuyo pa njira zoyambirira zokonzekera
Zitsanzo zogwirira ntchito zakale zimalepheretsa kutengera njira zamakono zoperekera mankhwala
impactSignals: Ndalama za pulogalamu zimakwera pamene kayendedwe ka KPI kakhalabe lathyathyathya
Zoyambira zimaphonya mfundo za handoff pakati pa njira, zomangamanga, ndi kuphedwa
Magulu amakumana ndi kutopa kosintha ndi phindu lochepa la bizinesi

approach.overview: Timaphatikiza uphungu wa njira ndi zomangamanga zoperekera, kugwirizanitsa kapangidwe ka chitsanzo chogwirira ntchito, luso la nsanja, ndi kuphedwa kwa cadence mozungulira zolinga zoyezeka.

pillars.title: Mtengo Wamtengo Wapatali
pillars.detail: Timatsatira njira zochokera ku zotsatira za bizinesi zoyeza komanso zopinga zodalira zamakono.

pillars.title: Cholinga Chogwirira Ntchito Model Design
pillars.detail: Maudindo, kayendetsedwe kake, ndi ufulu wosankha zimafotokozedwa kuti zithandizire kuphedwa mwachangu m'magulu amabizinesi ndi ukadaulo.

pillars.title: Ulamuliro Woperekera Portfolio
pillars.detail: Kupita patsogolo kwa kusintha kumayang'aniridwa kudzera mu malo oyang'anira ogwirizana ndi KPI ndi maulamuliro a chiopsezo cha portfolio.

principles.overview: Zomangamanga zathu zosintha zimagogomezera kusintha kwamakono kowonjezereka komanso kuwerengera momveka bwino, kupewa kusokoneza kulembanso popanda kulungamitsa bizinesi.

items.title: Kugwirizana kwa Kuthekera kwa Bizinesi
items.detail: Kusintha kwa teknoloji kumakonzedwa mozungulira mphamvu zomwe zimapanga mapu mwachindunji ku ndalama, khalidwe la utumiki, kapena mtengo wamtengo wapatali.

items.title: Composable Platform Strategy
items.detail: Zigawo za nsanja zimasankhidwa kuti zigwirizane kuti zithandizire kusamuka kwapang'onopang'ono komanso kusintha mofulumira.

items.title: Ulamuliro ndi Delivery Cadence
items.detail: Mabungwe osankha ndi mfundo zowongolera zimaphatikizidwa mu maulendo othamanga ndi kotala, osati kuchitidwa ngati njira zosiyana za bureaucratic.

breakdown.title: Kugwirizana kwa Njira
breakdown.summary: Timagwirizanitsa zofunikira za utsogoleri ndi zolinga za digito kuti tipange chitsogozo chosintha chogawana.
deliverables: Kukhwima kwa kuthekera ndi kuwunika kwa kusiyana

breakdown.title: Pulani ya Kuphedwa
breakdown.summary: Timatanthauzira chitsanzo chogwirira ntchito chandamale, miyezo ya zomangamanga, ndi ndondomeko yogwiritsira ntchito pang'onopang'ono.
deliverables: Chitsanzo chogwirira ntchito ndi kapangidwe ka kayendetsedwe ka kayendetsedwe ka ka

breakdown.title: Kusintha ndi Kuzindikira Phindu
breakdown.summary: Timayendetsa kutengera, kutsatira kayendedwe ka KPI, ndikuwongolera njira zochokera ku zotsatira zoperekera.

cta.title: Yambani Ulendo Wanu Wosintha
cta.description: Yendetsani kusintha ndi zofunikira zomveka bwino komanso mapulani othandiza operekera.

hero.title: IoT & Edge Computing
hero.description: Machitidwe olumikizidwa kuchokera ku chipangizo kupita ku mtambo, ndi mapaipi a telemetry ndi nzeru zam'mphepete za mafakitale.

problem.title: Kupanga Vuto la Bizinesi
problem.subtitle: Chifukwa chiyani mapulogalamu olumikizidwa amalephera kukula kupitirira kutumizidwa kwa oyendetsa ndege

approach.title: Njira ya Uinjiniya
approach.subtitle: Momwe timapangira machitidwe otetezeka, operable a IoT kuchokera ku firmware ya chipangizo kupita ku ma API amtambo

principles.title: Mfundo za Zomangamanga
principles.subtitle: Malamulo a kapangidwe ka m'mphepete mwa mtambo wodalirika, latency, ndi kayendetsedwe ka zombo

technology.title: IoT Technology Stack
technology.subtitle: Kuchokera ku hardware kupita ku mtambo

breakdown.title: Kuwonongeka kwa Utumiki
breakdown.subtitle: Momwe timaperekera machitidwe olumikizidwa kuchokera ku zipangizo zam'mphepete kupita ku nzeru zamtambo

problem.overview: Ntchito za IoT nthawi zambiri zimatsimikizira kuthekera kwaukadaulo kwa oyendetsa ndege koma zimalephera pamlingo chifukwa cha kulumikizana kosadalirika, maulamuliro ofooka a zombo, komanso kugwirizana kosayenera ndi ntchito zamalonda.
painPoints: Kugwiritsa ntchito chipangizo ndi kasamalidwe ka moyo kumakhalabe kwamanja komanso kolakwika
Mapaipi a telemetry amatulutsa phokoso, osakwanira, kapena kuchedwa kwa deta yogwira ntchito
Lamulo lakutali ndi zosintha za firmware zimayambitsa chitetezo ndi chitetezo
impactSignals: Malo oyendetsa ndege amapambana, koma nthawi yopanga yopanga imatsetsereka mobwerezabwereza
Magulu ogwira ntchito m'munda amachitapo kanthu pazochitika popanda kuwonekera kuneneratu
Machitidwe a bizinesi sangathe kudya mokhulupirika nzeru za chipangizo mu nthawi yeniyeni

approach.overview: Ife zomangamanga nsanja IoT monga machitidwe ankalamulira anagawira, kuphatikiza otetezeka m'mphepete miyezo runtime, chochitika zoyendetsedwa kulowetsa, ndi kayendetsedwe ntchito pa zombo mlingo.

pillars.title: Kasamalidwe ka Moyo wa Chipangizo Chotetezeka
pillars.detail: Kupereka, kudziwika, kusinthasintha kwa kiyi, ndi zosintha za firmware zimakhala zokhazokha kuti muchepetse chiopsezo chogwirira ntchito.

pillars.title: Zomangamanga za Telemetry Zoyendetsedwa ndi Zochitika
pillars.detail: Mapaipi akukhamukira amakhazikitsa, kutsimikizira, ndi kuyendetsa zochitika za chipangizo cha analytics ndi kulamulira pafupi ndi nthawi yeniyeni.

pillars.title: Ndege Yoyang'anira Ntchito Zankhondo
pillars.detail: Kuyang'anira, kuchenjeza, ndi ntchito zakutali zimapereka kuyang'anira kodalirika pazinthu zogawidwa.

principles.overview: Zomangamanga zathu za IoT zimagwirizanitsa zosankha zochepa za m'mphepete mwa latency ndi kayendetsedwe kapakati, kuwonera, ndi kutsatira chitetezo.

items.title: Edge Autonomy ndi Cloud Coordination
items.detail: Ntchito zovuta zakomweko zimapitirira panthawi yowonongeka kwa intaneti pamene zikugwirizana ndi boma ku machitidwe a mtambo pamene zilipo.

items.title: Ndondomeko ya Zochitika Zogwirizana
items.detail: Magulu a chipangizo ndi nsanja amagwiritsa ntchito ma schema olamulidwa kuti asunge kugwirizana kwa telemetry m'mabaibulo.

items.title: Chitetezo cha Chipangizo cha Zero-Trust
items.detail: Kutsimikiziridwa kwa wina ndi mnzake, mwayi wochepa, ndi mayendedwe achinsinsi amakakamizidwa pa mgwirizano uliwonse wa chipangizo.

breakdown.title: Chipangizo & Edge Strategy
breakdown.summary: Timatanthauzira njira zolumikizirana, miyezo yothamanga, ndi kupereka kotetezeka kwa zipangizo zam'munda.
deliverables: Chipangizo cha onboarding ndi kulumikizana chitsanzo
Nthawi yothamanga ya m'mphepete ndi pulani yogwiritsira ntchito

breakdown.title: Telemetry & Control Plane
breakdown.summary: Timamanga mapaipi omwe amagwira zochitika, kupanga chitsanzo cha mapasa a digito, ndikuthandizira ntchito zoyendetsera kutali.
deliverables: Kuyamwa kwa nthawi yeniyeni ndi kapangidwe ka schema ya zochitika
Mapasa a digito ndi chitsanzo cha katundu kukhazikitsa

breakdown.title: Ntchito ndi Kukula
breakdown.summary: Timagwiritsa ntchito kayendetsedwe ka zombo ndi maulamuliro odalirika a malo opanga IoT.
deliverables: Kuyang'anira zombo za chipangizo ndi kuchenjeza
Kukonza kuneneratu ndi kudziwika kwa anomaly

cta.title: Lumikizani Zipangizo Zanu
cta.description: Pangani njira zodalirika za IoT zokonzekera malo enieni opanga.
